MORDREDSABER-CLARENT_THE_STOLEN_SWORD.de: #At the start of each combat, enter *Masked Knight. Whenever you lose HP, gain !Stars! *Critical *Stars. Whenever you consume a Critical, gain !NpCharge! *NP Charge. Each conversion triggers up to !MaxProcs! times per turn.
MORDREDSABER-CLARENT_THE_STOLEN_SWORD.fl: The sword she pried from the stone that was never meant for her hand. Every wound feeds the lightning; every strike feeds the hate.
MORDREDSABER-CLARENT_OVERLOADED_WITH_HAT: #At the start of each combat, enter *Masked Knight. Whenever you lose HP, gain !Stars! *Critical *Stars. Whenever you consume a Critical, gain !NpCharge! *NP Charge. Each conversion triggers up to !MaxProcs! times per turn.
The blade drank her hatred until it overflowed. Now the lightning answers twice for every wound, twice for every strike.
MORDREDSABER-OATH_OF_THE_KNIGHT_OF_TREAC: Oath of the Knight of Treachery

#Mordred earns Bond points from combat victories (/+2, Elites /+3, Bosses /+5) and from entering events, shops and rest sites (/+1). Each *Bond* level grants permanent gifts: Max HP (Lv 1/3/6/9), starting *NP *Charge (Lv 2/5/8), starting *Critical *Stars (Lv 4/7) - and at Lv 10, Acknowledged as a Son: the first time you take off the helm each combat, gain 1 Energy.
The vow she swore to a father who never called her child. The recognition he denied her, earned blade in hand.
MORDREDSABER-SUMMONING_SEAL_SABER_OF_RED: #At card rewards you may give up the card to roll the gacha: 50% chance of a dupe, /+25% per failed roll. A dupe raises Mordred's NP level (the counter, max 5), increasing her Noble Phantasm cards' power by 15% per level.
The crest that bound her to her Master. Spend a catalyst, and the Knight of Rebellion answers the call once more.
MORDREDSABER-RED_BIKE_OF_TRIFAS.title: Red Bike of Trifas
MORDREDSABER-RED_BIKE_OF_TRIFAS.flavor: Riding B: she can mount anything. The roads of Trifas never knew a louder engine or a worse temper.
MORDREDSABER-KAIRIS_CIGARETTES.title: Kairi's Cigarettes
MORDREDSABER-KAIRIS_CIGARETTES.descripti: #The first time you gain a *Critical each combat: draw 2 cards.
MORDREDSABER-KAIRIS_CIGARETTES.flavor: Her Master's brand, half-crushed in the pack. He always lit one before the real fight started.
MORDREDSABER-MAGIC_RESISTANCE_B_CHARM.de: #The first debuff an enemy would apply to you each combat is negated.
MORDREDSABER-MAGIC_RESISTANCE_B_CHARM.fl: Rank B. Most spells slide off the King of Knights' wayward son like rain off red armor.
MORDREDSABER-RED_GLASSES_OF_SABER.title: Red Glasses of Saber
MORDREDSABER-RED_GLASSES_OF_SABER.descri: #At the start of each combat, gain 20 *Critical *Stars.
MORDREDSABER-RED_GLASSES_OF_SABER.flavor: The Glasses Spiritron costume's frames. They do nothing for her eyesight and everything for her glare.
MORDREDSABER-BANNER_OF_CAMLANN.title: Banner of Camlann
MORDREDSABER-BANNER_OF_CAMLANN.descripti: #In Elite or Boss combats, start with 30 *NP *Charge and 10 *Critical *Stars.
MORDREDSABER-BANNER_OF_CAMLANN.flavor: The standard raised on the field where she struck down her king. Against the mighty, the hate runs hottest.
MORDREDSABER-THE_EMPTY_SEAT_OF_THE_ROUND: The Empty Seat of the Round Table
#Whenever you play an NP card: gain 20 *Critical *Stars.
The chair they never offered her. She takes it now, one stroke of crimson lightning at a time.
MORDREDSABER-GREY_CAT_OF_TRIFAS.title: Grey Cat of Trifas
MORDREDSABER-GREY_CAT_OF_TRIFAS.descript: #At the end of your turn, if you played no Attacks: gain 10 *Critical *Stars and heal 2 HP.
MORDREDSABER-GREY_CAT_OF_TRIFAS.flavor: A scruffy stray that adopted her Master's lodgings. The one truce in all of Trifas she never broke.
MORDREDSABER-HOLY_GRAIL_OF_SELECTION.des: #Palingenesis: gain !MaxHp! Max HP. While held, limits break: Bond can reach level 12 and NP level can reach 6.
MORDREDSABER-HOLY_GRAIL_OF_SELECTION.fla: The wish she fought a Great War to claim: not a throne, but the chance to draw the sword from the stone with her own hand.
